title: microchilus ovalis
intro: Microchilus ovalis, also known as the Yellow Coralroot, is a plant species in the family Bignonaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Microchilus ovalis is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
